title: State, Bengaluru women lawyers defend menstrual leave policy before Karnataka High Court
description: The Karnataka government has told the Karnataka High Court that its recent policy mandating the grant of paid menstrual leave to working women in various establishments has scientific and objective basis [Karnataka Employers Association v Government of Karnataka].The State made the submissions earlier this week before a Bench of Justice Anant Ramanath Hegde, in response to petitions challenging the paid menstrual leave policy. Justice Anant Ramanath HegdeRepresenting the State, Advocate General
